title: Balanced Boats
body:
# Balanced Boats

Balanced Boats makes boats an unbalanced abomination, this plugin is for **__Bukkit, Spigot and Paper__** and will cause Blue Ice to spawn under all boats being ridden by a player, it will also give those players buffs (Regeneration, Resistance, Saturation) for the duration of their time in the boat - and destroy all blocks they move towards as they reach them. I do not suggest you use this plugin on a long-lasting world but for a challenge or as part of a mash-up this could be a welcome addition.

## Installation Guide
To install this plugin you must be running Spigot Bukkit or Paper, then once you have run the server once to create your main directories you can simply drag and drop it into "plugins" and after a restart or reload, it is ready to go out of the box, enter a boat and you're away.

## Lisencing
Balanced Boats is a completely open-source project under the MIT licence and all the code can be found through the **External Resources** tab on the side panel, or via the link below.

## Additional Links
[Download](https://modrinth.com/plugin/balancedboats/versions) exclusive to Modrinth can be found here.

[Source Code](https://github.com/tnn1nja/balancedBoats) can be found here.

[Issue Tracker](https://github.com/tnn1nja/balancedBoats/issues) if you want to report any bugs you can do so here.

[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@tnn1nja) you can find more from me here.
